title: OrderInboundMessage
description: PROVISIONAL CONTRACT (pending Phase 2 sandbox validation). Single source of truth (Golden Rule #10) for the Service Bus 'orders-inbound' message envelope consumed by the Writeback function (TDD §4.4 / §5.5 / §8). Checkout enqueues this message instead of blocking on the ERP; writeback retries with a DLQ and de-dups on idempotencyKey before any FinOps create. sessionId scopes a Service Bus session so order entities are written with controlled, per-(customer/site) concurrency rather than parallel-hammered. Header -> lines are linked by the resulting sales order number. No personal data or secrets belong in this envelope.

idempotencyKey.description: De-duplication key. Writeback de-dups on this before creating a sales order so retries never create duplicates.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID propagated cart -> reserve -> order -> fulfilment for end-to-end tracing.

sessionId.description: Service Bus session id used for controlled concurrency. Derived from customer/site so order-entity writes for the same context are serialized (never parallel-hammered).

customerAccount.description: FinOps customer account number that owns the order.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the order.

paymentMethod.description: How the order is settled: 'Card' (prepaid via the payment provider) or 'OnAccount' (net terms, no card captured). Defaults to 'Card' when absent.

purchaseOrderNumber.description: Optional customer purchase-order reference, header-level. Carried to the FinOps sales order header.

lines.description: Order lines. Linked to the header by the sales order number once FinOps assigns it.

placedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp the order was placed by the customer.

lockedPrice.description: Price locked for this line at order time (sourced from the pricing/credit interface).

site.description: Site/branch the line is sourced from. Aggregate vs branch-specific availability is an Open Decision (#7).

requestedShipDate.description: Optional requested ship date for this line.

backorder.description: Whether this line is accepted as a backorder.

reservationReference.description: IVS reservation id backing this line. IVS is the sole reservation authority; this links the order line to its soft reservation.
